languages.text: "Докладываю: процессия корабельных рабочих устроила на палубах благодарственное шествие и молит дозволения посетить мостик. Насколько я понимаю, это связано с вашим особым отношением к {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментике{/g}. Что им ответить, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "Докладываю: процессия корабельных рабочих устроила на палубах благодарственное шествие и молит дозволения посетить мостик. Насколько я понимаю, это связано с вашим особым отношением к {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментике{/g}. Что им ответить, Лорд-капитан?"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"
languages.original_text: "Докладываю: процессия корабельных рабочих устроила на палубах благодарственное шествие и молит дозволения посетить мостик. Насколько я понимаю, это связано с вашим особым отношением к {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментике{/g}. Что им ответить, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "Reporting: a procession of ship workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, requesting clearance to access the bridge. This is presumably due to your specific attention to {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentics{/g}. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a procession of ship workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, requesting clearance to access the bridge. This is presumably due to your specific attention to {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentics{/g}. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, requesting clearance to access the bridge. This is presumably for your specific attention to {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, requesting clearance to access the bridge. This is presumably for your specific attention to {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, eine Prozession der Arbeiter des Schiffes veranstaltet auf den Decks eine Dankeskundgebung und erbittet Zugang zur Brücke. Ich denke, es geht um Eure Dekrete bezüglich der {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentierungen{/g}. Wie lauten Eure Befehle?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, eine Prozession der Arbeiter des Schiffes veranstaltet auf den Decks eine Dankeskundgebung und erbittet Zugang zur Brücke. Ich denke, es geht um Eure Dekrete bezüglich der {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentierungen{/g}. Wie lauten Eure Befehle?"

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, une procession d'ouvriers du vaisseau a entamé une marche de gratitude dans les niveaux inférieurs et demande l'autorisation d'accéder à la passerelle. Je crois comprendre que c'est en lien avec vos décrets concernant les {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmétiques{/g}. Quels sont vos ordres ? »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, une procession d'ouvriers du vaisseau a entamé une marche de gratitude dans les niveaux inférieurs et demande l'autorisation d'accéder à la passerelle. Je crois comprendre que c'est en lien avec vos décrets concernant les {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmétiques{/g}. Quels sont vos ordres ? »

languages.text: “舰长大人，舰上的工人们在甲板上组织了一场感恩游行，请求获准进入舰桥。据我了解，这是为了感谢您颁布的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}法令。您有何指示？”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，舰上的工人们在甲板上组织了一场感恩游行，请求获准进入舰桥。据我了解，这是为了感谢您颁布的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}法令。您有何指示？”

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, un grupo de trabajadores ha organizado una procesión de agradecimiento por las cubiertas y solicita que se les permita visitar el puente. Si no me equivoco, se debe a su decreto sobre los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}auméticos{/g}. ¿Qué ordena?».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, un grupo de trabajadores ha organizado una procesión de agradecimiento por las cubiertas y solicita que se les permita visitar el puente. Si no me equivoco, se debe a su decreto sobre los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}auméticos{/g}. ¿Qué ordena?».

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、船の労働者たちの行列が甲板で感謝の行進を行い、ブリッジへの立ち入りを許されたいと懇願しています。私の理解では、これはあなたの{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}オーグメティックス{/g}に関する勅令に関わるものかと存じます。いかが命じられますか？」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、船の労働者たちの行列が甲板で感謝の行進を行い、ブリッジへの立ち入りを許されたいと懇願しています。私の理解では、これはあなたの{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}オーグメティックス{/g}に関する勅令に関わるものかと存じます。いかが命じられますか？」

languages.text: "Gemi işçilerinden oluşan bir alay, güvertelerde şükran yürüyüşü düzenliyor ve köprüye çıkmalarına izin verilmesi için yalvarıyor Lord Kaptan. Anladığım kadarıyla bu, {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmetiklerle{/g} ilgili kararnamelerinizle alakalı. Emirleriniz neler?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Gemi işçilerinden oluşan bir alay, güvertelerde şükran yürüyüşü düzenliyor ve köprüye çıkmalarına izin verilmesi için yalvarıyor Lord Kaptan. Anladığım kadarıyla bu, {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmetiklerle{/g} ilgili kararnamelerinizle alakalı. Emirleriniz neler?"
